title: Just ask: if items
problem: Set label to 'has items' when the list has something in it, otherwise 'empty'.

trace.note: `if items:` asks whether items is truthy. A non-empty list is truthy, so we take the first branch.
trace.checkpoint_prompt: items is [3, 8] and the test is `if items:`. Which branch runs?

trace.note: label = 'has items'. The falsy values are empty containers, 0, '' and None; everything else is truthy. Let the value speak for itself.
